creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244231
1990s-like

The WWW: approach in areas such as <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#mirrors-cdrom> creates a sense of things being archaic. 

Please consider modernisation of some such files.
